title: Dashboard
footnote: All figures come from the invoice ledger — the same numbers as the Invoices view. Debtors is the current outstanding total, independent of the period.

pnl.title: Profit & loss
pnl.monthlyNote: Monthly figures — whole calendar months only (labour costs are a monthly wage bill).
pnl.hoursChargedSub: own mechanics’ hours — fixed-service hours + ad-hoc labour (outsourced work excluded)
pnl.honesty: Labour and net figures are based on your Headcount (salaried staff) and Overheads settings, and hours-charged on the labour hours set on each fixed-price service — keep those current for accurate numbers.
pnl.degradedNote: P&L is whole calendar months only — showing {{label}}.
pnl.utilSetupLink: tick chargeable mechanics and set contracted hours in HR →
pnl.utilCalc: {{mechanics}} mechanic(s) over {{days}} rostered days − {{leave}} leave − {{ph}} bank holidays = {{available}} available; {{charged}} charged = {{pct}}

notTrading: {{site}} isn’t trading this month — no invoices and no chargeable mechanics. Figures below show any costs apportioned to it.
